Advisory.Description:
### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-95pq-hr8p-f5g7. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
An issue in ComfyUI-Manager prior to version 3.38 allowed remote attackers to potentially manipulate its configuration and critical data. This was due to the application storing its files in an insufficiently protected location that was accessible via the web interface
Advisory.Summary: Duplicate Advisory: ComfyUI-Manager has an Unprotected Alternate Channel (CWE-420)
